CustomField.description: When adding to a tour, by default we go to /apex/AddToTour?id=[tour id]. You can override this behaviour here. For example, entering "MyNewBookingForm?tourId=" will redirect to /apex/MyNewBookingForm?tourId=[tour id]
CustomField.inlineHelpText: When adding to a tour, by default we go to /apex/AddToTour?id=[tour id]. You can override this behaviour here. For example, entering "MyNewBookingForm?tourId=" will redirect to /apex/MyNewBookingForm?tourId=[tour id]
CustomField.label: Booking Form Page Override
